No. 801/8/^5-P-lTNDRS--dated 31st October, 1995-under the said sub-section directing that Shri Palvhuler Singh Randhawa S/o Shri Darshan Singh Randhawa who ordinarily resided at A-26, Ring Road, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi be detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Burail, Chandigarh with a, view to..preventing him from engaging;,in procurement, possession, transportation and sale of narcotic drugs. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or is concealing him- self so that the order- cannot be executed ; 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-sectipn (1.) of Section .8. of. the^sai.d .Act,. the Central Government "hereby directs the • aforesaid" perVon to appear before the Commissioner of Customs & Central Excise, Chandigarh within 10 days of the publication of this order in the official Gazette. [P. No. 801/8/95-PITNDPS] B. K. ARORA, Wilder-: -Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
